title: FBI, CISA warn of Russian hackers hijacking Signal and WhatsApp accounts

scripts.content: SecRule REQUEST_HEADERS:Host "@rx ic3\.gov" "id:370001,phase:1,deny,status:403,msg:'CDB APEX Block: thr-0bc4623803b5'"

| CDB APEX v37.0 Threat Hunt Query
index=* ((query IN ("ic3.gov"))) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, action | sort -count
